name: Briarpatch
overview: Dogged investigator Allegra Dill returns to her border-town Texas home after her sister is murdered. What begins as a search for a killer turns into an all-consuming fight to bring her corrupt hometown to its knees.

trailers.title: BRIARPATCH | Faces Of Saint Disgrace | Premieres February 6 on USA Network
